case_title: RITCHIE, KATHLEEN VS B & A TOWING

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $90.00 FILED BY RITCHIE, KATHLEEN AS TO DEFENDANT B & A TOWING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-1994 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 00
